title: jurinea nivea
intro: Jurinea nivea, also known as white jurinea or white fleabane, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant contains compounds such as sesquiterpene lactones, which have been shown to exhibit potential health benefits, including antioxidant and anticancer properties. In traditional medicine, Jurinea nivea is used to prepare herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are believed to help alleviate various health conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
